_description: PairDrop stack — upstream images consumed via docker-compose and referenced as FROM in src/*/Dockerfile. The monitor tracks digests on floating tags (incl. :latest) and triggers a release when an upstream image moves.

images.name: pairdrop
images.description: LinuxServer.io PairDrop file-sharing web app (used in all docker-compose*.yml)

images.name: coturn
images.description: Coturn TURN/STUN server — base image for src/coturn/Dockerfile and used directly in docker-compose.development.yml

images.name: alpine
images.description: Alpine Linux — base image for src/acme-manager/Dockerfile and src/config/Dockerfile
